description_long: This is a sleek, silver coupe car with a streamlined body and a sporty, aggressive stance. The front features a wide grille, angular headlights, and a sculpted hood, giving it a dynamic appearance. The side profile reveals two doors, pronounced wheel arches, and blacked-out windows, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. At the rear, the car has a subtle spoiler, rectangular taillights, and a clean bumper, all contributing to its modern look. The wheels are large and dark, matching the car's overall aesthetic. The roofline is smooth and gently sloped, characteristic of a fastback coupe.
description: A silver, sporty coupe car with two doors, blacked-out windows, and a fastback roofline. It features a wide grille, sculpted body, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide grille, angular headlights, and a sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, blacked-out windows, and pronounced wheel arches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays rectangular taillights, a subtle spoiler, and a clean bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's sleek lines and sporty stance.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
